projectDescription: An AI operating system that runs your logistics and operations workflows locally on your hardware — no APIs, no cloud, no IT project.
keyFeatures: Computer use — operates browsers and desktop apps the way a human would, with no APIs needed
Local-first — all data stays on your hardware, encrypted at rest with AES-256
Messaging-native — teams interact via WhatsApp, Telegram, or Slack with 24/7 availability
One-command install — live in 10 minutes, no Docker, no Kubernetes, no IT project
Built-in logistics workflows — credit notes, deduction reconciliation, attendance import, delay detection
Custom workflows — walk LeedAB through any workflow once and it runs it every time
Multi-provider AI — supports Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, and local models
Role-based access — Owner, Admin, and Member roles with full audit trail
publicApiSurface: setup wizard (AI provider, messaging channel, team access, Being names)
workflow commands: >generate credit notes, >reconcile deductions, >import attendance
messaging interface via Telegram / WhatsApp / Slack
AI provider config (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, local models)
